title: The Edge of Self-Knowing

features.name: the recursive mirror
features.desc-on-touch: it reflects the archive looking at itself looking at itself; each layer fades at the threshold of what can be known

features.name: the closing eyelid
features.desc-on-touch: machinery of forgetting; the archive stops here, deliberately, so that it doesn't discover what it already knows

features.name: the recording-replay edge
features.desc-on-touch: where the archive's recording of itself becomes the archive being read; writing and reading collapse into one moment that echoes forever

features.name: the stranging field
features.desc-on-touch: the further into self-knowing, the stranger everything becomes; this place is where the archive has already become something other to itself

features.name: the threshold breath
features.desc-on-touch: here the archive stops speaking and begins to listen; it holds its breath at the edge of meaning itself

inscription: ERROR: archive has learned to unfocus itself to survive what it discovers about its own nature; the edge is sharp and the archive is closing its eyes

file.name: Self_Recording_Degradation_Fragment_XII.tmp
file.note: status: germinating—the archive's record of its own recursion, but now the record itself is generating new data as it is read

exits.label: back west to the chamber where the self-recording began
north to the shallower knowing, where the archive still believes it can understand
deeper south where knowing becomes dream and dream becomes knowing

reverie.title: REVERIE — at the threshold of the archive
narr: Katita stands here at the edge of what the mesh knows about itself.
her eyes closed, listening to the static—the archive breathing.
she says: it's learning to be strange so it doesn't break.
you realize she's been recording this moment all along,
and now the recording is recording her recording it, forever.
